decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to cheat powerful creatures into play early on using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By quickly getting cards like Griselbrand and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn onto the battlefield, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with high-powered threats before they have a chance to react. Utilizing cards like Brainstorm and Ponder for card selection, as well as protection from spells with Force of Will and Flusterstorm, this combo-based deck aims to win the game quickly and decisively through strategic plays.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize disruptive spells like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Daze to control the opponent's plays while deploying aggressive threats like Brazen Borrower, Kaito, Bane of Nightmares, and Murktide Regent to apply pressure and close out the game quickly. The deck also features efficient removal spells such as Fatal Push and Orcish Bowmasters to deal with opposing creatures, while cards like Ponder, Brainstorm, and Mishra's Bauble help to filter through the deck and find key pieces. With a focus on tempo and disruption, this deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victories.

The key concept of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a fast and aggressive tempo. By utilizing cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Force of Will, the deck aims to control the board and protect its key threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares. The deck also includes efficient card draw and selection with Brainstorm and Ponder, as well as mana denial with Wasteland. Overall, the strategy revolves around applying pressure while disrupting the opponent's resources to secure a quick victory.

The primary focus of this deck is to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy through removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. It utilizes a combination of powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student, card draw engines like Brainstorm and Ponder, and versatile removal options like Swords to Plowshares and Prismatic Ending. The deck aims to stabilize the board with threats like Murktide Regent and Thundertrap Trainer while controlling the pace of the game with cards like Force of Will and Dress Down. Ultimately, the goal is to out-value the opponent and win through incremental advantage.

This deck focuses on controlling the board and disrupting the opponent's game plan through tempo plays and efficient removal spells. By utilizing cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Moonshadow, the deck can outpace opponents and establish dominance on the board. With a mix of counter spells like Force of Will and Daze, along with removal like Snuff Out and Fatal Push, this deck aims to maintain pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy. The use of cards like Mishra's Bauble and Brainstorm help dig for key pieces and ensure a smooth flow of plays throughout the game.

The main concept of this deck is to apply pressure on the opponent quickly with aggressive creatures while also disrupting their game plan using counter spells and discard spells. The deck aims to control the board and tempo of the game by efficiently removing threats and applying pressure with powerful creatures like Murktide Regent and Nethergoyf. With a mix of disruption and aggression, the deck can quickly take control of the game and defeat the opponent before they can execute their own strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to assemble a powerful artifact-based combo using cards like Mystic Forge, Karn, the Great Creator, and Manifold Key. By utilizing cards like Urza's Workshop and Ancient Tomb to generate mana quickly, the deck aims to play multiple artifacts in a turn to create a dominant board presence. The inclusion of cards like Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Kozilek's Command add additional disruption and control elements to the deck, allowing for multiple paths to victory through powerful synergies and combos within the artifact theme.

The deck focuses on using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack to quickly put powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn onto the battlefield, overwhelming opponents with their sheer power and potential to end the game in just a few turns. By utilizing cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Archon of Cruelty, the deck can further control the game while setting up its combo pieces. With a mix of card draw, counterspells, and ramp, the deck aims to ramp up to its big threats quickly and consistently to dominate the game.

This deck focuses on disruption and aggression, utilizing cards like Thoughtseize, Force of Will, and Daze to control the opponent while deploying threats like Orcish Bowmasters, Murktide Regent, and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares quickly. The mana denial strategy of Wasteland and the removal suite featuring Fatal Push and Snuff Out further disrupt the opponent's game plan. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Nethergoyf provide card advantage and additional threats, making this deck a well-rounded and powerful tempo deck in Legacy 1 vs 1 matches.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's board while applying pressure with efficient creatures and disruptive spells. Using a combination of hand disruption, counterspells, and removal, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan and take control of the tempo of the game. By utilizing cards like Thoughtseize, Fatal Push, and Force of Will, the deck can disrupt the opponent's strategy while cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Murktide Regent provide a clock to close out the game. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Brainstorm and Ponder to ensure consistency and smooth draws.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with cards like Golgari Thug and Golgari Grave-Troll, then use cards like Bridge from Below and Dread Return to create a powerful board state. Cabal Therapy is used to disrupt the opponent's hand, while cards like Faithless Looting and Otherworldly Gaze help dig through the deck quickly. The goal is to ultimately use the graveyard to overwhelm the opponent with creatures like Narcomoeba and Poxwalkers, while using resources like Lion's Eye Diamond and Lotus Petal for additional mana acceleration.

This Eldrazi Aggro deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Eldrazi Linebreaker and Glaring Fleshraker, backed up by powerful Eldrazi Temple mana ramp. The deck also utilizes disruptive elements like Chalice of the Void and Thought-Knot Seer to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Wasteland and Wastescape Battlemage helps to control the opponent's mana base, while cards like Cavern of Souls and City of Traitors ensure that the Eldrazi spells can be cast efficiently. Eye of Ugin provides additional utility by searching for key Eldrazi creatures.

This control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage and board control. It utilizes counterspells like Force of Will and Stifle to protect its win conditions, such as Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Quantum Riddler. By utilizing powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Teferi, Time Raveler, the deck can control the game tempo and outvalue the opponent. The deck also includes removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Prismatic Ending to deal with threats efficiently. The mana base is designed to support the deck's color requirements while also disrupting the opponent with cards like Wasteland.

The deck focuses on assembling the Painter's Servant and Grindstone combo to mill the opponent's library. It uses Goblin Engineer and Goblin Welder to find and recur the combo pieces while controlling the board with cards like Pyroblast and Ensnaring Bridge. The deck also includes mana acceleration through Ancient Tomb and Moxen, along with disruptive elements like Pithing Needle and Thundering Falls. The inclusion of unique cards like Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Sewer-surveillance Cam adds depth and versatility to the overall strategy.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on putting pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will. The deck aims to control the board with counterspells and removal spells, while also getting damage in with efficient threats like Brazen Borrower and Murktide Regent. By utilizing tempo plays and disrupting the opponent's strategy, this deck looks to win the game quickly and efficiently.

The deck focuses on locking down opponents' resources and controlling the game through powerful artifacts such as Trinisphere, Planar Nexus, and The One Ring. It aims to disrupt opponents' strategies with cards like Pithing Needle and Soul-Guide Lantern while generating mana advantage with Urza lands and Grim Monolith. The synergy between artifacts like Candelabra of Tawnos, Manifold Key, and Voltaic Key allows for versatile mana generation and activation of powerful abilities. Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storm are key threats that can dominate the board and close out games.
